name: Fragor
description: A large two-handed hammer, the Fragor requires great strength to wield, but impacts with enough force to send groups of enemies tumbling.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: A large two-handed hammer, the Fragor requires great strength to wield, but impacts with enough force to send groups of enemies tumbling.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Hammers Palatine skin changing sizes when equipped on the Arca Triton and Fragor Prime. It will now be the same size across the board.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Zephyr Prime 22.16.4
patchlogs.changes: Vauban Prime, Fragor Prime and Akstiletto Prime have entered the Prime Vault, and their Relics are no longer be obtainable in the game.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.additions: including Vauban Prime, Fragor Prime, Akstiletto Prime, and exclusive Customizations only available through Prime Access!

patchlogs.name: Update 18.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Galatine, Scindo series, War, Fragor and Magistar damage increased in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Update 18.3
patchlogs.changes: The Scindo series, Gram, Galatine, Magistar, Fragor and Jat Kittag have had their damage and Stance damage increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons are now available for use in Conclave:  Dera, Dera Vandal, Boltor, Boltor Prime, Tonfa, Heat Sword, Dual Heat Swords, Glaive, Glaive Prime, Kestrel, Fragor, Wraith Karak.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.2.1 +15.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Improved the weapon trail on the Fragor/Brokk attack animations.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.5: Easter And Hotfixes!
patchlogs.changes: Wield the new Brokk! A brother of the Fragor Hammer, this faster swinging (but slower charging) Hammer is deadly!
